mapper.select: SELECT MAX(order_no) FROM work_order WHERE order_no LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order (order_no, device_id, creator_id, fault_desc, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{deviceId}, #{creatorId}, #{faultDesc}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order SET repairer_id = #{repairerId}, status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
UPDATE work_order SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE work_order SET repair_log = #{repairLog}, status = 3, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 2
UPDATE work_order SET status = 4, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 3
UPDATE work_order SET status = -1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN (0, 1)
